title: Rockhausenia castroviejoi
taxonomy: Rockhausenia castroviejoi is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It belongs to the genus Rockhausenia, which is a small group of flowering plants. The exact classification of Rockhausenia castroviejoi is still being studied and refined by botanists. Further research is needed to determine the precise relationships between Rockhausenia castroviejoi and other Annonaceae species. As of my knowledge cutoff, there is limited information available on the classification of Rockhausenia castroviejoi.
